name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(ggplot2)

# --- 模型參數定義 ---
params <- list(
  M1 = c(a = 32.422, b = 0.672, c = 0.0556, rmse = 2.059),
  M2 = c(a = 27.197, b = 0.690, c = 0.0666, rmse = 2.063),
  M3 = c(a = 23.164, b = 0.650, c = 0.0877, rmse = 2.120),
  M4 = c(a = 22.171, b = 0.671, c = 0.0925, rmse = 2.116),
  M5_base = c(a = 20.557, b = 0.670, c = 0.0926, rmse = 2.131)
)

# M5 的修正係數 (針對 a 參數)
m5_offsets <- c(
  Secondary = 2.290,
  Trees = 0.642,
  midtolerant = 0.157,
  intolerant = 0.897
)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("亞熱帶森林樹高預測工具 (Appendix)"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      numericInput("dbh", "輸入胸徑 DBH (cm):", value = 20, min = 1, max = 150),
      selectInput("model", "選擇預測模型:", 
                  choices = c("M1: Baseline" = "M1", 
                              "M2: Global" = "M2", 
                              "M3: Species-level" = "M3", 
                              "M4: Site/Species nested" = "M4", 
                              "M5: Functional traits" = "M5")),
      
      # 僅當選擇 M5 時顯示的額外選項
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.model == 'M5'",
        selectInput("forest", "森林類型:", choices = c("Primary", "Secondary Forest")),
        selectInput("lifeform", "生活型:", choices = c("shrub", "Trees")),
        selectInput("tolerance", "耐陰性:", choices = c("tolerant", "midtolerant", "intolerant"))
      ),
      hr(),
      helpText("本工具基於 Weibull 公式: H = 1.3 + a * (1 - exp(-c * DBH^b))")
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      h3(textOutput("pred_h")),
      plotOutput("curve_plot")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output) {
  
  # 計算當前參數
  current_params <- reactive({
    if (input$model == "M5") {
      a_val <- params$M5_base["a"]
      if (input$forest == "Secondary Forest") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["Secondary"]
      if (input$lifeform == "Trees") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["Trees"]
      if (input$tolerance == "midtolerant") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["midtolerant"]
      if (input$tolerance == "intolerant") a_val <- a_val + m5_offsets["intolerant"]
      
      # [修復 1] 強制轉為純數值再命名，避免名稱變成 b.b 和 c.c 而抓不到 NA
      return(c(a = as.numeric(a_val), 
               b = as.numeric(params$M5_base["b"]), 
               c = as.numeric(params$M5_base["c"])))
    } else {
      return(params[[input$model]][1:3])
    }
  })
  
  # 預測樹高
  output$pred_h <- renderText({
    p <- current_params()
    h <- 1.3 + p["a"] * (1 - exp(-p["c"] * (input$dbh ^ p["b"])))
    paste0("預測樹高: ", round(h, 2), " 公尺")
  })
  
  # 繪製曲線
  output$curve_plot <- renderPlot({
    p <- current_params()
    
    # 預先算好紅點的座標
    pred_x <- input$dbh
    pred_y <- 1.3 + p["a"] * (1 - exp(-p["c"] * (pred_x ^ p["b"])))
    
    # 準備 200 個點來畫平滑曲線
    dbh_seq <- seq(0, 100, length.out = 200)
    h_seq <- 1.3 + p["a"] * (1 - exp(-p["c"] * (dbh_seq ^ p["b"])))
    df <- data.frame(DBH = dbh_seq, H = h_seq)
    
    ggplot(df, aes(x = DBH, y = H)) +
      geom_line(size = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
      # [修復 2] 改用 annotate 畫單一紅點，就不會跳長度不合的 Warning 了！
      annotate("point", x = pred_x, y = pred_y, color = "red", size = 4) +
      labs(title = paste("模型生長曲線 -", input$model), x = "DBH (cm)", y = "Height (m)") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
      ylim(0, 40)
  })
}
shinyApp(ui, server)
